hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *ai-post-scheduler/includes/class-aips-*-controller.php|*ai-post-scheduler/includes/class-aips-*-service.php) COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1 bash -c 'cd ai-post-scheduler && composer lint:repository-boundary' ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *ai-post-scheduler/includes/class-aips-db-manager.php) echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Reminder: schema changes require bumping both the \`Version:\` header and \`AIPS_VERSION\` constant in ai-post-scheduler/ai-post-scheduler.php.\"}" ;; esac
